ラモーナが気持ち良さそうに歌っている。その周囲には、その歌声に誘われた<br>リ:
Ramona was singing with evident joy. Drawn by her song, many forest
creatures—squirrels, birds, and more—had gathered around her.
全員が耳を澄ませてラモーナの歌声に聴き入っている。: All of them listened intently, captivated by Ramona's voice.
ラモーナの歌が終わると、辺りから拍手や歓声が上がった。<br>森の生き物たちがそ:
When Ramona's song ended, applause and cheers rose from all
around. The forest creatures praised her song in their own ways.
ラモーナ、すごいな。<br>歌のことはよく分からないが、ますます上手くなってるん:
Ramona, that was incredible. I don't know much about singing, but
you're getting better and better, aren't you?
本当ですか？ 司令官さまにそう言ってもらえると自信が持てます。<br>私も最近ま:
Really? Hearing you say that, Commander, gives me confidence.
Lately, I've found singing easier, and I enjoy it so much.
これも、司令官さまのレッスンのおかげですね♪<br>ふふふ。: This is thanks to your lessons, too, Commander.♪ Fufufu.
レッスンのことを思い出したのか、ラモーナははにかむように頬を赤らめる。<br>そ:
Perhaps remembering the lessons, Ramona blushed shyly. Her smile
made me feel a bit tickled as well.
本当に上手くなってるぞ。歌に集まってくる動物たちも増えているようだし。<br>ほ:
You really are getting better, and it seems more animals are
gathering for your song. Look, even the offerings are piling up.
歌が終わると動物たちは、木の実などの置き土産を置いていく。<br>その量も、以前:
When the song ended, the animals left offerings of nuts and fruit.
There seemed to be even more than before.
本当にたくさん……<br>私のことを仲間だと思ってくれているみたいで、それが何よ:
There truly are so many... They seem to think of me as one of them,
and that makes me happier than anything.
動物たちの置き土産の中に、一つ鮮やかなピンク色の実が混ざっていた。<br>鮮やか:
Among the animals' offerings, a vivid pink fruit was mixed in. It was
so bright that it was a color to be wary of in the forest.
この色……どんな動物が置いて行ったものだろう？<br>人には危険かもしれないから:
This color... what kind of animal could have left this? It might be
dangerous for humans, so you'd better not eat it.
そんなことはありませんよ～。<br>森の皆さんが食べているものですから大丈夫です:
Not at all, Commander. The forest creatures eat it, so it's perfectly
safe.
そう言うとラモーナは、鮮やかなピンク色の木の実をポイッと口に<br>放り込んでし:
Saying that, Ramona popped the vivid pink fruit into her mouth and
chewed and swallowed it down.
ラモーナが蕩けそうな笑みを浮かべる。それを見てホッとしたのも束の間、<br>すぐ:
Ramona wore a melting smile. I felt a moment of relief, but soon her
cheeks flushed red and her eyes grew moist and hazy.
大丈夫ですってばぁ。<br>それより、司令官さま……: I told you, it's fine! More importantly, Commander...
このまま……司令官さまのこと押し倒しちゃっても、<br>構いませんか……？: Would you mind if I just pushed you down like this, Commander...?
……は？ 押し倒す？<br>何を言ってるんだ？: Huh? Push me down? What are you talking about?
ラモーナの様子が明らかにおかしい。<br>これはやはり、今の木の実のせいなのでは:
Ramona's behavior was clearly strange. It had to be because of that
fruit...
司令官さま……私、もう我慢できないんです……<br>身体が熱くて熱くて……ですか:
Commander... I can't hold back anymore... My body is so hot, so hot...
So... *pant*!♪
ラモーナは、いきなり抱きつくように覆い被さってきた。<br>地面に押し倒し、その:
Ramona suddenly lunged at me, as if to embrace me. She pushed me to
the ground and straddled me.
